secureNote: Information is captured and stored securely

step1.title: Create your myTomorrows account
step1.description: Create your account to check your status, stay on top of your next steps, view and edit your medical information.

step2.title: Receive overview of clinical trial options
paragraphs: We will review your medical information and look for clinical trial options that match your medical situation. Within one week, we will let you know when your trial search overview is ready for download in your account.
If we need more information before creating your overview, we will contact you by email within one week.

help.title: Need help?
help.intro: Find answers in our FAQs or reach out to us directly.

faqCard.title: FAQs
faqCard.description: We've combined some of our most asked questions to help you.

contactCard.title: Contact us
contactCard.intro: If you have any questions or need more information, send an email to:

steps.title: Are you the patient or a caregiver?
steps.whyAsk: We tailor questions and follow-up to the person completing this form.

steps.title: What is your age?
steps.whyAsk: Age eligibility is set by each protocol and regulatory requirements.

steps.title: Which rare blood disease do you have?
steps.subtitle: Please choose the option that best matches your diagnosis.
steps.whyAsk: We match you to trials that enroll people with specific conditions.

steps.title: Which treatments have you received for your condition, and which are you currently receiving?
steps.subtitle: Please include medications, therapies (including clinical trials) and procedures.
steps.whyAsk: Inclusion criteria often depend on prior or current treatment.

steps.title: How would you prefer to be contacted if you may be a match?
Your contact details
steps.subtitle: We will only use this information to reach you about your inquiry.
steps.whyAsk: Our team needs a way to follow up if you may match a study.

fields.label: Phone number
fields.placeholder: Include country code if outside your home country
